languages.text: "А зачем мы славим Бога-Императора, когда все уже потеряно? Зачем выживаем там, где должны умереть? Потому что у нас нет права не сражаться против неизбежного. Иждриг будет биться за полк даже против Ангелов Императора. Устав говорит: "Гвардейцу надлежит страшиться лишь неисполнения долга".

traits.locale_text: "А зачем мы славим Бога-Императора, когда все уже потеряно? Зачем выживаем там, где должны умереть? Потому что у нас нет права не сражаться против неизбежного. Иждриг будет биться за полк даже против Ангелов Императора. Устав говорит: "Гвардейцу надлежит страшиться лишь неисполнения долга".
traits.speaker: CaptainVedkaDunavski

languages.text: "And why do we praise the God-Emperor even when all seems lost? Why do we struggle to survive even where we should surely perish? Because we have no choice but to fight against the inevitable. Izdrig will battle for the regiment even against the Emperor's Angels. As the Handbook states, 'The only thing a Guardsman should fear is the failure to do their duty.'"
languages.original_text: "А зачем мы славим Бога-Императора, когда все уже потеряно? Зачем выживаем там, где должны умереть? Потому что у нас нет права не сражаться против неизбежного. Иждриг будет биться за полк даже против Ангелов Императора. Устав говорит: "Гвардейцу надлежит страшиться лишь неисполнения долга".

traits.locale_text: "And why do we praise the God-Emperor when all seems lost? Why do we strive to survive where we should surely perish? Because we have no right to cease fighting against the inevitable. Izdrig will battle for the regiment even against the Emperor's Angels. The Codex states: 'A guardsman is to fear only the failure of his duty.'"

"And why do we praise the God-Emperor when all seems lost? Why do we strive to survive where we should surely perish? Because we have no right to cease fighting against the inevitable. Izdrig will battle for the regiment even against the Emperor's Angels. The Codex states: 'A guardsman is to fear only the failure of his duty.'"

Izdrig will battle for the regiment even against the Emperor's Angels. As the Code states, 'The only thing a Guardsman should fear is the failure to do their duty.'"

"And why do we praise the God-Emperor even when all seems lost? Why do we struggle to survive even where we should surely perish? Because we have no choice but to fight against the inevitable. Izdrig will battle for the regiment even against the Emperor's Angels. As the Handbook states, 'The only thing a Guardsman should fear is the failure to do their duty.'"

languages.text: “为什么我们即使身处绝境，却仍在赞美神皇？为什么我们即使明知必死，却仍在拼命求生？因为除了与注定的结局抗争到底，我们别无选择。即使对手是帝皇的天使，伊兹德里格也会为这个军团而战。如《手册》所言，‘卫兵唯一当畏惧之事，便是未能恪尽职守。’”
languages.original_text: "And why do we praise the God-Emperor even when all seems lost? Why do we struggle to survive even where we should surely perish? Because we have no choice but to fight against the inevitable. Izdrig will battle for the regiment even against the Emperor's Angels. As the Handbook states, 'The only thing a Guardsman should fear is the failure to do their duty.'"

traits.locale_text: “为什么我们即使身处绝境，却仍在赞美神皇？为什么我们即使明知必死，却仍在拼命求生？因为除了与注定的结局抗争到底，我们别无选择。即使对手是帝皇的天使，伊兹德里格也会为这个军团而战。如《手册》所言，‘卫兵唯一当畏惧之事，便是未能恪尽职守。’”

languages.text: "Peki her şey kaybolmuş gibi göründüğünde bile neden Tanrı İmparator'u övüyoruz? Neden kesinlikle yok olacağımız yerlerde bile hayatta kalmak için mücadele ediyoruz? Çünkü kaçınılmaz olana karşı savaşmaktan başka seçeneğimiz yok. İzdrig, İmparator'un Melekleri'ne karşı bile alay için savaşacaktır. El Kitabı şöyle der: 'Bir Muhafız'ın korkması gereken tek şey, vazifesini yerine getirememektir.'"
languages.original_text: "And why do we praise the God-Emperor even when all seems lost? Why do we struggle to survive even where we should surely perish? Because we have no choice but to fight against the inevitable. Izdrig will battle for the regiment even against the Emperor's Angels. As the Handbook states, 'The only thing a Guardsman should fear is the failure to do their duty.'"

traits.locale_text: "Peki her şey kaybolmuş gibi göründüğünde bile neden Tanrı İmparator'u övüyoruz? Neden kesinlikle yok olacağımız yerlerde bile hayatta kalmak için mücadele ediyoruz? Çünkü kaçınılmaz olana karşı savaşmaktan başka seçeneğimiz yok. İzdrig, İmparator'un Melekleri'ne karşı bile alay için savaşacaktır. El Kitabı şöyle der: 'Bir Muhafız'ın korkması gereken tek şey, vazifesini yerine getirememektir.'"

languages.text: « Et pourquoi rendons-nous gloire à l'Empereur-Dieu alors que tout semble perdu ? Pourquoi luttons-nous pour survivre même quand la mort semble certaine ? Parce que nous n'avons pas d'autre choix que de résister à l'inévitable. Izdrig affronterait n'importe qui au nom du régiment, même les Anges de l'Empereur. Comme le déclare le Manuel : "La seule chose qu'un garde impérial doit craindre, c'est de manquer à son devoir." »
languages.original_text: "And why do we praise the God-Emperor even when all seems lost? Why do we struggle to survive even where we should surely perish? Because we have no choice but to fight against the inevitable. Izdrig will battle for the regiment even against the Emperor's Angels. As the Handbook states, 'The only thing a Guardsman should fear is the failure to do their duty.'"

traits.locale_text: « Et pourquoi rendons-nous gloire à l'Empereur-Dieu alors que tout semble perdu ? Pourquoi luttons-nous pour survivre même quand la mort semble certaine ? Parce que nous n'avons pas d'autre choix que de résister à l'inévitable. Izdrig affronterait n'importe qui au nom du régiment, même les Anges de l'Empereur. Comme le déclare le Manuel : "La seule chose qu'un garde impérial doit craindre, c'est de manquer à son devoir." »

languages.text: «¿Y por qué alabamos al Dios Emperador cuando todo parece perdido? ¿Por qué luchamos por sobrevivir aunque nuestra muerte sea algo seguro? Porque debemos luchar contra lo inevitable. No hay alternativa. Izdrig lucharía por el regimiento incluso contra los ángeles del Emperador. Como dice el manual: "Lo único que debe temer un guardia es fracasar en su deber"».
languages.original_text: "And why do we praise the God-Emperor even when all seems lost? Why do we struggle to survive even where we should surely perish? Because we have no choice but to fight against the inevitable. Izdrig will battle for the regiment even against the Emperor's Angels. As the Handbook states, 'The only thing a Guardsman should fear is the failure to do their duty.'"

traits.locale_text: «¿Y por qué alabamos al Dios Emperador cuando todo parece perdido? ¿Por qué luchamos por sobrevivir aunque nuestra muerte sea algo seguro? Porque debemos luchar contra lo inevitable. No hay alternativa. Izdrig lucharía por el regimiento incluso contra los ángeles del Emperador. Como dice el manual: "Lo único que debe temer un guardia es fracasar en su deber"».

languages.text: "Und warum preisen wir den Gottimperator, wenn alles verloren scheint? Warum versuchen wir zu überleben, wenn uns der Tod gewiss ist? Weil wir keine andere Wahl haben, als gegen das Unvermeidliche zu kämpfen. Izdrig wird selbst gegen die Engel des Imperators für das Regiment kämpfen. Wie es das Handbuch besagt: 'Das Einzige, was ein Gardist fürchten sollte, ist die Nichterfüllung seiner Pflicht'."
languages.original_text: "And why do we praise the God-Emperor even when all seems lost? Why do we struggle to survive even where we should surely perish? Because we have no choice but to fight against the inevitable. Izdrig will battle for the regiment even against the Emperor's Angels. As the Handbook states, 'The only thing a Guardsman should fear is the failure to do their duty.'"

traits.locale_text: "Und warum preisen wir den Gottimperator, wenn alles verloren scheint? Warum versuchen wir zu überleben, wenn uns der Tod gewiss ist? Weil wir keine andere Wahl haben, als gegen das Unvermeidliche zu kämpfen. Izdrig wird selbst gegen die Engel des Imperators für das Regiment kämpfen. Wie es das Handbuch besagt: 'Das Einzige, was ein Gardist fürchten sollte, ist die Nichterfüllung seiner Pflicht'."

languages.text: 「そして、なぜ、すべてが失われたように見える時でも、神皇帝を称賛するのか？なぜ、確実に死すべき場所でも生き残るために戦うのか？それは、避けられない運命に抗う以外に選択肢がないからである。イズドリックは、皇帝の天使たちに対しても連隊のために戦う。ハンドブックにあるように、『衛兵が恐れるべき唯一のものは、任務を果たさないことである』」
languages.original_text: "And why do we praise the God-Emperor even when all seems lost? Why do we struggle to survive even where we should surely perish? Because we have no choice but to fight against the inevitable. Izdrig will battle for the regiment even against the Emperor's Angels. As the Handbook states, 'The only thing a Guardsman should fear is the failure to do their duty.'"

traits.locale_text: 「そして、なぜ、すべてが失われたように見える時でも、神皇帝を称賛するのか？なぜ、確実に死すべき場所でも生き残るために戦うのか？それは、避けられない運命に抗う以外に選択肢がないからである。イズドリックは、皇帝の天使たちに対しても連隊のために戦う。ハンドブックにあるように、『衛兵が恐れるべき唯一のものは、任務を果たさないことである』」
